# CI PR Template

## Description

<!-- What CI/CD configuration was changed and why? -->

## Related Issues/Milestones

- Relates to #<issue_number> (optional)
- Milestone: <milestone_name_or_link> (optional)

## Changes

<!-- Bullet list of workflows, jobs, or config files modified. -->

## Verification

- [ ] Pipeline runs successfully on this branch
- [ ] No unintended jobs triggered or skipped
- [ ] Secrets/environment variables accounted for
- [ ] Tested via temporary branch if needed (e.g. `ci/<description>`)

## Risk

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Notes: <impact on existing pipelines or deployment flows>

## Checklist

- [ ] CI green on this branch
- [ ] No changes to production code
- [ ] Docs updated if applicable
